title: Senior Doctor - SRL Diagnostics - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - SRL Diagnostics - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!
